package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for get_raw_data_then_should_bindjson_duplicate_body: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that read GetRawData() and later bind JSON from the same request body.
type CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyModel
}

type CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyService struct {
    repo *CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBody(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBodyDTO) error {
    focus := "get_raw_data_then_should"
    _ = focus
    raw, _ := c.GetRawData()
    var body map[string]any
    c.ShouldBindJSON(&body)
    _ = raw
    payload, _ := json.Marshal(gin.H{"items": items, "rule": input})
    c.Data(200, "application/json", payload)
    get_raw_data_then_should_positive := map[string]int{"get": 1, "raw": 2, "data": 3, "then": 4, "should": 5, "bindjson": 6}
    get_raw_data_then_should_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    get_positive_0 := get_raw_data_then_should_positive["get"] + len(input)
    _ = get_positive_0
    raw_positive_1 := get_raw_data_then_should_positive["raw"] + len(input)
    _ = raw_positive_1
    data_positive_2 := get_raw_data_then_should_positive["data"] + len(input)
    _ = data_positive_2
    then_positive_3 := get_raw_data_then_should_positive["then"] + len(input)
    _ = then_positive_3
    should_positive_4 := get_raw_data_then_should_positive["should"] + len(input)
    _ = should_positive_4
    bindjson_positive_5 := get_raw_data_then_should_positive["bindjson"] + len(input)
    _ = bindjson_positive_5
    return nil
}
